CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-30-2012 Off Calendar

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-06-2012 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On May-08-12 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Settlement on the record.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.

Michael Chambers, Esq. for the Plaintiff: Edwin Tan
Alex Friedland, Esq. for and with the Defendant: Qui Truong, and with Insurance Adjuster Samita Bhatt.
Case settled, terms read into the record as follows:
Settlement amount of $2,000.00 to be made immediately in exchanged for release and a dismissal. Each side to bear own costs and fees.
Parties agreed to terms on the record, matter was deemed settled by the court, and was set on the CRC dismissal calendar for 05-08-13 at 10 a.m. in Dept. 610.
